items.title: Structure of the Gods I
items.medium: Ink, mixed media, acrylic modeling paste, found canvas, watercolor
items.description: Originally made in undergrad and revisited in graduate school. A close-up of the entity depicted in SGIII, a fully rendered face emerging from the abstraction. What began as a separate piece found its place within a larger narrative when the three works were brought together.

items.title: Structure of the Gods II
items.medium: Ink, mixed media, acrylic modeling paste, found canvas, watercolor
items.description: Made on a found canvas from a giveaway bin. Built through first-thought impulse, automatism, and new material exploration, this piece functions as a closer view of SGIII with texture as the primary emphasis, a process of learning to accept and trust the way the work arrives.

items.title: Structure of the Gods III
items.medium: Ink, mixed media, acrylic modeling paste, found canvas, watercolor
items.description: Made on a found canvas from a giveaway bin. Beginning with an intuitive abstraction, the image was drawn out of what was already there, painted and drawn until a form took shape. The series, originally conceived as separate pieces, revealed itself as a unified narrative only after being seen together.
